action.reasoning: Observation: Best hidden score is now 0.6156 from the 70/30 rank-normalized baseline/window ensemble, improving over 75/25 and 80/20. Analysis: The optimum may use still more window contribution, but evals cost ~15 minutes and remaining wall time likely allows only 2 more submissions. Need inspect current ensemble utility/model code before creating the next checkpoint, per workspace-edit rule. Decision: quickly inspect existing code, then next iteration generate/evaluate a 65/35 or 60/40 rank blend depending on available script interface.
action.command:
sed -n '1,240p' make_ensemble.py && printf '
--- model.py ---
' && sed -n '1,260p' model.py && printf '
--- predict.py ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' predict.py
